g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
initiateOperation(initiator: Actor, target: Resource, channel: Interface, grant: Permission, pre: State, post: State) : REQ_AUTH_01
Operation must have exactly one initiator, at least one target, at least one channel
return Error("Initiator not in target.accessible set")
At least one channel must have authenticated = True
return Error("Operation not allowed under heavy load with unauthenticated channel")
State transitions from Pre1 (system operational) to Post1 (authentication attempts logged)
storeLogEntry(operation: REQ_AUTH_01, loggedBy: Security_Auditors, timestamp: Int) : Boolean
Operation must not proceed without recording
return Error("Log storage failed - Write permission required")
createAuditLogEntry(operation: REQ_AUTH_01, loggedBy: Security_Auditors, timestamp: Int) : AuditLogEntry
FLOW-ACCOUNT-LOCK : Account Lock/Unlock State Change Logging
initiateOperation(initiator: Actor, target: Resource, channel: Interface, grant: Admin, pre: Pre1, post: State) : REQ_AUTH_01
Only Security_Auditors or System_Administrators can modify logs
return Error("Only authorized actors can modify logs")
State transitions to Post2 (secure, tamper-evident format)
storeSecureLogEntry(operation: REQ_AUTH_01, loggedBy: Security_Auditors, timestamp: Int) : Boolean
createAuditLogEntry(operation: REQ_AUTH_01, loggedBy: Security_Auditors, timestamp: Int) : AuditLogEntry
State transitions to Post1 (authentication attempts logged)
storeLogEntry(operation: REQ_AUTH_01, loggedBy: Security_Auditors, timestamp: Int) : Boolean
createAuditLogEntry(operation: REQ_AUTH_01, loggedBy: Security_Auditors, timestamp: Int) : AuditLogEntry
return Warning("Logged locally, pending sync to central service")
return Success("Audit log entry sent to central service")
return Error("Initiator not in target.accessible set")
return Error("Operation not allowed under heavy load with unauthenticated channel")
return Error("Log storage failed - Write permission required")
return Error("Only authorized actors can modify logs")
return Warning("Logged locally, pending sync to central service")
